title: EzShop
description: EasyShop is a user-friendly sales plugin for Minecraft servers that allows players to sell their items quickly and easily. With a clean user interface and full Vault integration, this plugin provides an efficient way to improve server profitability.
body:
# Description
EasyShop is a user-friendly sales plugin for Minecraft servers that allows players to sell their items quickly and easily. With a clean user interface and full Vault integration, this plugin provides an efficient way to improve server profitability.

Features

    Easy selling of inventory:
    Players can use the /shop command to open a special sale inventory where they can place their items.
    Dynamic prices:
    An individual sales price can be assigned to each item in config.yml. The total price is calculated from the quantity of items.
    Configurable messages:
    All messages can be easily customised in config.yml to adapt the communication to the style of the server.
    Vault integration:
    Players receive their coins directly from the economic system (Vault required).
    Secure sale:
    Non-configurable or invalid items are automatically returned to the player.

Advantages

        Minimal set-up effort
        Customisable messages and prices
        Efficient management of player transactions
        Supports all Vault-compatible economic systems


How to install

    Download the .jar file and place it in the plugins folder of your server.
    Start the server to generate the config.yml.
    Customise the sales prices and messages in the config.yml.
    Make sure that Vault is installed on your server and connected to your economy system.

Commands:

    /Shop - Opens the sales inventory for the player.

Requirements:

    Minecraft server with Paper or Spigot (1.21.4 or higher).
    Vault installed and configured.
